inputs.label: Square Rods
inputs.businessContext: Area in square rods to be converted to square meters

businessContext_i18n.en: Area in square rods to be converted to square meters
businessContext_i18n.tr: Metrekareye dönüştürülecek kare rod cinsinden alan
businessContext_i18n.de: Fläche in Quadratruten, die in Quadratmeter umgerechnet werden soll
businessContext_i18n.fr: Surface en perches carrées à convertir en mètres carrés
businessContext_i18n.es: Área en varas cuadradas a convertir a metros cuadrados
businessContext_i18n.ar: المساحة بالقضبان المربعة المراد تحويلها إلى أمتار مربعة

inputs.label: Conversion Factor
inputs.businessContext: Standard conversion factor from square rods to square meters

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard conversion factor from square rods to square meters
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kare roddan metrekareye standart dönüşüm faktörü
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur de conversion standard des perches carrées en mètres carrés
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de conversión estándar de varas cuadradas a metros cuadrados
businessContext_i18n.ar: عامل التحويل القياسي من القضبان المربعة إلى الأمتار المربعة

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places to round the final output

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places to round the final output
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nihai çıktının yuvarlanacağı ondalık basamak sayısı
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen zum Runden des Endergebnisses
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de décimales pour arrondir le résultat final
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de decimales para redondear la salida final
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد المنازل العشرية لتقريب الناتج النهائي

inputs.label: Area Adjustment
inputs.businessContext: Optional area adjustment percentage (e.g., for cut/fill factor)

businessContext_i18n.en: Optional area adjustment percentage (e.g., for cut/fill factor)
businessContext_i18n.tr: İsteğe bağlı alan ayarlama yüzdesi (örneğin, kazı/dolgu faktörü için)
businessContext_i18n.de: Optionaler prozentualer Flächenanpassungsfaktor (z. B. für Abtrag/Auftrag)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage d'ajustement de surface optionnel (par exemple, facteur de déblai/remblai)
businessContext_i18n.es: Ajuste de área opcional en porcentaje (por ejemplo, para factor de corte/relleno)
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة تعديل المساحة الاختيارية (مثل عامل القص/الردم)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
